name: Crown Rack of Veal
recipeIngredient: 2 each Veal, loins, frenched and tied by the butcher
Bones and meat trimmings from the veal loins
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roast in a pan and put a small bowl in the cavity of the roast so that it will retain its proper shape. Fill the bowl with water.
2. Brush meat with melted butter and pat on the bread crumbs and Romano cheese. Salt and pepper, if desired.
3. Add carrots, onions, and any bones or scraps to the pan with wine or water.
4. Cook in a 350°F oven for 1 1/2 hours.
5. When done, remove the bowl from the cavity and add stuffing.
6. Strain the roasting juices and reduce to make a sauce.
Stuffing:
1. Cook the hog jowl slowly in a skillet until the fat renders out.
2. Add onion and cook until clear.
3. Add oysters and their water, and cook until reduced by one-third.
4. Squeeze the milk out of the bread crumbs and add them to the pan.
5. Whisk eggs with parsley and scallions and add to the stuffing.
6. Add beef stock and cook for 15 minutes. Taste and correct seasoning.
